reasoning: MAFF GI entry for Tajima Beef in Hyogo with official translated description, registration date, producer group, and source URL. Kobe Beef also surfaced contextually. Highly grounded.

reasoning: Same Tajima Beef GI record returned with high-confidence Arabic translation. Names, descriptions, source URLs intact.

reasoning: Returns Japan Heritage story 009 (800-Year Tea History) covering Minami-Yamashiro region, plus unrelated Chinjufu (military port) entry. The body mentions Uji-centric content; user asked specifically for the village (not Uji), so constraint partially honored.

reasoning: Only 1 Yamanashi festival item (Yoshida Fire Festival) with thin one-line description. Surrounding national_heritage list crowds out the requested item. Date/details (Aug 26-27, Kitaguchi Hongu Fuji Sengen Shrine) absent.

improvement_hint: Enrich bunka_intangible records with date_recurring + venue when Wikidata has them; or backfill from official tourism sites.

reasoning: Query asked about Chugei (中芸) yuzu — registered as 'Chugei Yuzu' GI for Geisei/Tano/Yasuda/Nahari/Kitagawa/Umaji. Response returned Monobe yuzu (different region, same prefecture) plus generic 'グルメ' scrape stubs. The actual target GI not present.

reasoning: Long municipal-scrape blurbs about Hyogo broadly — Himeji Castle is mentioned but buried in tourism navi text rather than as a clean entity. Lots of nav-chrome (links to other spots).

reasoning: Query specifically asks about Bunraku in Osaka. Tool returned 183 traditional arts items — Nogaku first, festivals like Kibune/Okuma/Kawagoe, no clear Bunraku surface. Bunraku (人形浄瑠璃文楽) likely buried.
